$schema: CaseLoad Select Core Chassis · Phase 6 Templates v1
compliance_note: Every email ends with {{custom_values.compliance.lso_disclaimer}} and unsubscribe link. No hardcoded firm data.

email_templates.name: J1_acknowledgment_email
email_templates.subject: Your inquiry is with us, {{contact.first_name}}
email_templates.description: Confirms inquiry received. Sets expectation for follow-up. No outcomes promised.

email_templates.name: J1_brief_delivery_email
email_templates.subject: Band A lead: {{contact.first_name}} {{contact.last_name}} — action required
email_templates.description: Lead summary table (name, phone, email, practice area, CPI score, matter). Links to triage portal. Take/Pass required within 48h.

email_templates.name: J2_booking_invite_email
email_templates.subject: Next step: schedule your consultation with {{custom_values.firm.display_name}}
email_templates.description: Invites lead to book 30-min consultation. Links to {{calendar.consult_url}}.

email_templates.name: J2_booking_reminder_email
email_templates.subject: Following up: your consultation with {{custom_values.firm.display_name}}
email_templates.description: Soft follow-up. Booking link still open. Low pressure.

email_templates.name: J3_triage_notification_email
email_templates.subject: Band C inquiry for review: {{contact.first_name}} {{contact.last_name}}
email_templates.description: Lead summary for Band C. Warns about 48h backstop. Links to triage portal.

email_templates.name: J4_decline_email
email_templates.subject: Regarding your inquiry to {{custom_values.firm.display_name}}
email_templates.trigger: Lawyer Pass decision or 48h backstop fires
email_templates.description: LSO-compliant decline. No reason given that implies legal advice. Refers to LSO referral service and Ontario Legal Aid. Warm but clear.

email_templates.name: RecoveryA_step1_email
email_templates.subject: Still here when the timing works, {{contact.first_name}}
email_templates.trigger: Spoke with lead but no consultation booked after +7d
email_templates.description: Light re-engagement. Low pressure. Calendar link included.

email_templates.name: RecoveryA_step2_email
email_templates.subject: One last check-in, {{contact.first_name}}
email_templates.description: Final outreach. Explicit that no further messages will be sent. Phone number offered.

email_templates.name: RecoveryB_step1_email
email_templates.subject: Questions after your consultation, {{contact.first_name}}?
email_templates.trigger: Consultation held but retainer not signed after +5d
email_templates.description: Post-consultation follow-up. Addresses hesitation. Invites questions. Not pushy.

email_templates.name: RecoveryB_step2_email
email_templates.subject: Following up from {{custom_values.lawyer.first_name}} at {{custom_values.firm.display_name}}
email_templates.description: Final follow-up. From lawyer directly. Graceful close if no engagement.

email_templates.name: J5_consult_reminder_email
email_templates.subject: Reminder: your consultation tomorrow with {{custom_values.firm.display_name}}
email_templates.description: Pre-consult prep reminder. What to bring, what to expect. Reschedule link.

email_templates.name: J7_welcome_email
email_templates.subject: Welcome to {{custom_values.firm.display_name}}, {{contact.first_name}}
email_templates.description: Post-retainer welcome. Sets communication expectations. Client portal link.

email_templates.name: J9_review_request_email
email_templates.subject: A small favour, {{contact.first_name}}
email_templates.trigger: Positive outcome trigger (retainer signed, matter closed, or lawyer-flagged)
email_templates.description: Google review request. Personal tone. Two-minute framing. Review link.

email_templates.name: J11_reactivation_email
email_templates.subject: Reconnecting, {{contact.first_name}}
email_templates.trigger: Long-term hold reactivation trigger event detected
email_templates.description: Re-engages whale or long-term hold leads. Asks if timing has changed. Calendar link.

email_templates.name: J12_review_followup_email
email_templates.subject: Following up: your review of {{custom_values.firm.display_name}}
email_templates.trigger: +48h after J9 review SMS if no review posted
email_templates.description: Email follow-up if SMS review request got no response. Closes the J12 loop.

sms_templates.note: GHL has no standalone SMS template library. SMS content lives in workflow action steps. Copy defined here as source of truth for P5 workflow build.
channel_rules: SMS is reserved for urgency (J1 Band A alert, J2 high-value reminder), significance (J7 closing-day, J12 review request), and missed-call text-back.
First SMS to any lead must include opt-out language: 'Reply STOP to unsubscribe.'
Opt-out trigger removes contact from all automated sequences.

templates.name: J0_missed_call_sms
templates.trigger: Missed inbound call to firm number (within 30 seconds)
templates.copy: Hi, this is {{custom_values.firm.display_name}}. We missed your call and want to help. Click here to tell us about your matter and we will follow up right away: {{intake.url}} — Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

templates.name: J1_band_a_lawyer_sms
templates.copy: Band A lead just arrived: {{contact.first_name}} {{contact.last_name}}, {{contact.practice_area}}. CPI: {{contact.cpi_score}}. Open triage portal: {{custom_values.portal.lawyer_url}}

templates.name: J2_booking_reminder_sms
templates.trigger: +24h after booking invite if not booked (Band B high-value only)
templates.copy: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, this is {{custom_values.lawyer.first_name}} at {{custom_values.firm.display_name}}. I wanted to follow up on your inquiry. Book a consultation here: {{custom_values.calendar.consult_url}} — Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

templates.name: J7_closing_day_sms
templates.copy: Welcome to {{custom_values.firm.display_name}}, {{contact.first_name}}. We are glad to be working with you. {{custom_values.lawyer.first_name}} will be in touch shortly with next steps.

templates.name: J12_review_request_sms
templates.trigger: Positive outcome trigger (sent before J12 email follow-up)
templates.copy: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, it was a pleasure working with {{custom_values.firm.display_name}}. A quick Google review would mean a lot to us: {{custom_values.firm.website}} — Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

implementation_notes: Email templates created via POST /emails/builder with pit-1d13628d-84bc-4a65-91f0-b5345264bfc0.
SMS copy defined here is entered inline in P5 workflow SMS action steps. Not a separate GHL resource.
All email merge tags use GHL double-brace syntax: {{contact.field_key}} and {{custom_values.key}}.
Review link in J9 and J12 uses {{custom_values.firm.website}} as placeholder. Replace with the actual Google review URL per client firm at onboarding.
Unsubscribe tag {{contact.unsubscribe_url}} is the GHL HTML email unsubscribe merge tag. Validate during P8 QA.
The test template '_API_TEST' (id: 69fba67bd052ead751fabc91) was created during API validation. Delete manually or exclude from snapshot export.
